description: Canonical Measurement.type tokens for anthropometric body girths/circumferences (SPEC §4.1/§4.5) — the tape-measure metrics logged alongside body composition (distinct from body-composition.json's body_mass/body_fat_percentage/lean_body_mass/bmi). UNIT-AGNOSTIC: the token names the girth, never its unit; the unit lives on Measurement.unit (recommended `cm` or `[in_i]`, per the producer's setting). LATERALITY IS NOT IN THE TOKEN: a limb girth's side (left/right) is carried on the `Measurement.laterality` field (SPEC §4.1, closed enum `left｜right｜bilateral`), NOT baked into a `_left`/`_right` token suffix. The token names the girth only — e.g. `bicep_circumference` with `laterality: "left"`, never `bicep_circumference_left`. Non-lateral (midline/axial) girths (neck/shoulder/chest/abdomen/waist/hip) omit `laterality` entirely.

tokens.label: Neck Circumference
tokens.description: Girth of the neck. Non-lateral (omit Measurement.laterality). Recommended unit: cm or [in_i].

tokens.label: Shoulder Circumference
tokens.description: Girth around the shoulders (deltoids). Non-lateral (omit Measurement.laterality). Recommended unit: cm or [in_i].

tokens.label: Chest Circumference
tokens.description: Girth around the chest. Non-lateral (omit Measurement.laterality). Recommended unit: cm or [in_i].

tokens.label: Abdomen Circumference
tokens.description: Girth around the abdomen (typically at the navel). Non-lateral (omit Measurement.laterality). Recommended unit: cm or [in_i].

tokens.label: Waist Circumference
tokens.description: Girth around the natural waist. Non-lateral (omit Measurement.laterality). Recommended unit: cm or [in_i].

tokens.label: Hip Circumference
tokens.description: Girth around the hips at the widest point. Non-lateral (omit Measurement.laterality). Recommended unit: cm or [in_i].

tokens.label: Bicep Circumference
tokens.description: Girth of the upper arm (bicep). Side-agnostic — carry the side on Measurement.laterality (left/right). Recommended unit: cm or [in_i].

tokens.label: Forearm Circumference
tokens.description: Girth of the forearm. Side-agnostic — carry the side on Measurement.laterality (left/right). Recommended unit: cm or [in_i].

tokens.label: Thigh Circumference
tokens.description: Girth of the thigh. Side-agnostic — carry the side on Measurement.laterality (left/right). Recommended unit: cm or [in_i].

tokens.label: Calf Circumference
tokens.description: Girth of the calf. Side-agnostic — carry the side on Measurement.laterality (left/right). Recommended unit: cm or [in_i].
